scripts.vercel-build: npm install --include=dev && npm --prefix kommison install --include=dev && npm --prefix kommison run build && rm -rf .next && cp -R kommison/.next .next && find .next -type f -name '*.nft.json' -exec sed -E -i 's#([.][.]/)+node_modules/#node_modules/#g' {} + && find .next -type f -name '*.nft.json' | xargs -r -n1 dirname | sort -u | while IFS= read -r d; do ln -sfn "$PWD/node_modules" "$d/node_modules"; done
